commits.content:
import { Package } from "lucide-react"; export default function SuccessProductAddingModal({ trader, selectedProducts, totalCost, remainingBalance, }) { return (

Success!

Products have been successfully added to{" "} {trader.name}'s inventory!

Products Added: {selectedProducts.size}
Total Cost: ${totalCost.toFixed(2)}
New Balance: ${remainingBalance.toFixed(2)}
); }
